children.name: Text
children.characters:
Institutional-grade real-time monitoring of SEC insider filings. From raw data to
actionable alerts in 60 seconds.

children.name: We pull raw SEC Form 4, 13D, and 13G filings directly from the EDGAR database via low-latency API. Our system monitors thousands of tickers 24/7.
children.characters:
We pull raw SEC Form 4, 13D, and
13G filings directly from the
EDGAR database via low-latency
API. Our system monitors
thousands of tickers 24/7.

children.name: Our proprietary AI filters out routine option exercises, tax- related sales, and automated 10b5-1 plans. We only alert you to genuine, open-market conviction buys.
children.characters:
Our proprietary AI filters out
routine option exercises, tax-
related sales, and automated
10b5-1 plans. We only alert you to
genuine, open-market conviction
buys.

children.name: Every significant trade is cross- referenced with 10 years of historical insider behavior, company financials, and current market context.
children.characters:
Every significant trade is cross-
referenced with 10 years of
historical insider behavior,
company financials, and current
market context.

children.name: When a high-conviction trade is detected, our system generates a comprehensive alert and sends it via email and push notification within 60 seconds of the filing's publication. Most competitors have a 24-hour delay — we don't.
children.characters:
When a high-conviction trade is detected, our system
generates a comprehensive alert and sends it via email and
push notification within 60 seconds of the filing's publication.
Most competitors have a 24-hour delay — we don't.

children.name: We don't just deliver alerts; we validate them against a decade of historical performance.
children.characters:
We don't just deliver alerts; we validate them against a
decade of historical performance.

children.name: Section - REAL-TIME INFRASTRUCTURE: BUILT FOR SPEED (REIMAGINED)
Text
children.characters:
Our low-latency infrastructure processes institutional filings faster than
retail terminals can refresh.

children.name: Text
children.characters: Get the edge you've been looking for.
